name: Flak Burst
effect_text: Deal 3 damage; +3 damage if target is a Drone.
flavor_text: Designed for the ones the real guns cannot be bothered with.

name: Sabot Round
effect_text: Deal 6 damage to Hull Integrity directly; ignores Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Drops its jacket at the muzzle. Arrives already unwelcome.

name: Spread Laser
effect_text: Deal 3 damage to up to 2 enemy Drones.
flavor_text: A fan of light across the near field. Everything small in it gets a receipt.

name: Hammer Salvo
effect_text: Hot Deploy. Deal 6 damage; enters ready to attack.
flavor_text: Strapped on the wing, strapped off the wing, everything in between loud.

name: Plasma Drill
effect_text: Deal 8 damage to target Engines subsystem.
flavor_text: Patient work. Keeps the ship in place so the real weapons can arrive.

name: Trench Cannon
effect_text: Deal 9 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Old name. Old calibration. Still writes the same ending in the same language.

name: Burst Mortar
effect_text: Hits up to 3 different targets for 3 damage each.
flavor_text: Lobs three polite questions at three rude guests. None answer back.

name: Drilling Missile
effect_text: Deal 11 damage to target Engines subsystem.
flavor_text: Lands nose-first, thinks afterward, stops asking questions somewhere on the drive manifold.

name: Railpulse Cannon
effect_text: Deal 13 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Charges once. Pays for itself the moment it stops charging.

name: Vector Missile
effect_text: Flanking Fire. Deal 12 damage. Must be blocked by 2 or more units.
flavor_text: Decides its angle in flight. Does not consult the pilot or the fleet.

name: Matter Beam
effect_text: Radiation Leak. Deal 15 damage and apply 3 damage over 3 turns.
flavor_text: Leaves a seam on the hull and a long, patient sickness inside it.

name: Annihilator Round
effect_text: Critical Strike. Deal 15 damage; any damage destroys Drones or Weapon systems.
flavor_text: One round in the magazine. The magazine was never meant to be reloaded.

name: Heavy Lance
effect_text: Deal 19 damage to target enemy unit or ship.
flavor_text: Asks nothing of the pilot but patience and a tolerance for the smell of copper.

name: Harrier Drone
effect_text: Priority Fire. Resolves damage before opponent this turn.
flavor_text: Small, fast, mean, and willing to be all three at once without a raise.

name: Raven Drone
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 1. Reorder the top card of your deck.
flavor_text: Two small lenses, eight small instincts, one very watchful afternoon.

name: Sentry Drone
effect_text: Tracking Array. Can block Skyward Maneuver units.
flavor_text: Points its lenses high. The fliers who thought themselves safe learn otherwise.

name: Wasp Drone
effect_text: Evade 30%. 30% chance to negate incoming damage.
flavor_text: Small stinger. Faster than the hand that reaches. Rarely the same hand twice.

name: Vanguard Drone
effect_text: Battle Hardened. Gains +1 power for each damage dealt to this unit.
flavor_text: Takes the punch. Returns it heavier. Keeps the change, pays no interest.

name: Hawk Drone
effect_text: A well-rounded combat drone.
flavor_text: Balanced frame. Quiet pilot. Loud and efficient conclusion written into the report.

name: Medic Drone
effect_text: Hull Drain. Damage this unit deals heals your ship for the same amount.
flavor_text: Carries the small white case with the red cross. The case is mostly empty.

name: Combat Medic
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. Restores 2 HP to your ship at end of your turn.
flavor_text: Works quickly. Works quietly. Never takes credit, never really needs to.

name: Lead Drone
effect_text: Outrider. First attack each turn does not cost your action.
flavor_text: Always first off the deck. Always first to the target. Always first to the story.

name: Shepherd Drone
effect_text: Crew Pooling. Allied units may contribute 1 cost when you play a Module.
flavor_text: Counts the pilots. Counts the energy. Spreads the bill across everyone kindly.

name: Tesla Drone
effect_text: EMP Pulse. Target enemy unit's power becomes 0 this turn.
flavor_text: A small argument with physics. Physics gets quiet for exactly one round.

name: Siege Lance Drone
effect_text: A heavy assault drone with a mounted lance.
flavor_text: Larger frame. Larger weapon. Pilot picks one room at a time, finishes each before moving.

name: Reactive Core
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 2. Reorder the top 2 cards of your deck.
flavor_text: Wakes up reading. Reads for just long enough to advise the pilot well.

name: Command Subroutine
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain +1 attack.
flavor_text: Handles the small orders so the pilot can handle the large silences.

name: Upgrade Processor
effect_text: Upgrade Trigger. Gains +1/+1 when you play a card with cost 4 or higher.
flavor_text: Small code that learns politely, upgrades itself quietly, reviews its own patch notes.

name: Signal Trap
effect_text: Signal Jamming. Opponent cannot play Maneuver cards next turn.
flavor_text: A small invisible net. The enemy pilot flies into it without ever seeing the mesh.

name: Data Scrubber
effect_text: Data Wipe. When played, opponent discards 1 random card.
flavor_text: Erases something from the opponent's morning. They do not remember what was there.

name: Targeting Sight
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon you control. Host gains +2 damage.
flavor_text: Small red dot. Large sense of purpose. The pilot grows fonder of it every fight.

name: Barrel Extender
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon you control. Host gains Priority Fire.
flavor_text: An extra inch of metal, an extra moment of accuracy, an extra ghost.

name: Recoil Damper
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon you control. Host adds 1 less heat when fired.
flavor_text: Absorbs the kick. The frame stays still. The pilot stays calm. Everything else stays.

name: Shield Module
effect_text: Attach to a Drone or your ship. Host gains +2 defense.
flavor_text: Bolt-on, flash-on, frame-hugging. The drone argues for a moment, then accepts.

name: Thruster Pack
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Evade 30%.
flavor_text: Clean air behind the drone. Messy conclusions for whoever follows too closely.

name: Booster Pack
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +2 attack.
flavor_text: Extra thrust, extra heat, extra chance the drone is the one who wins the exchange.

name: Plating Kit
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +3 defense.
flavor_text: Strapped on overnight. The drone learns to fly wider. The drone learns to live.

name: Radar Array
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your ship gains Tracking Array.
flavor_text: Old dish. Older habit. Still listens to the sky the way a bartender listens.

name: Cooling Unit
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Remove 1 extra heat at each turn end.
flavor_text: Runs quiet. Keeps the reactor calm. Keeps the pilot focused, the fight manageable.

name: Weapon Coupler
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Linked Fire.
flavor_text: Joins two triggers with a short wire. The wire does most of the math.

name: Drone Interface
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your Drones gain +1/+1.
flavor_text: A single protocol. The swarm hears it, obeys it, becomes slightly larger with it.

name: Sensor Package
effect_text: Attach to your ship. End Cycle: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Reads the world once per turn. Writes a single sentence for the pilot to consider.

name: Shield Capacitor
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Shield Capacity regenerates +2 per turn.
flavor_text: Keeps the shield coil drinking steadily. The shield coil does not mind.

name: Life Support Backup
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Life Support cannot be destroyed the first time it would be.
flavor_text: Redundant oxygen, redundant wiring, and a voice that calls the pilot by name.

name: Ammo Drum
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host may attack twice per turn.
flavor_text: Round capacity beyond polite. Pilot never runs out. Sometimes that is the problem.

name: Targeting Suite
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains Critical Strike.
flavor_text: The suite is quiet, the cabin is quiet, the enemy is quiet afterwards.

name: Armor Coating
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +4 defense and Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: Thick plating, thicker patience, the drone wears both without complaint.

name: Engine Upgrade
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains Skyward Maneuver.
flavor_text: A single afternoon of work turns the drone into something that climbs for a living.

name: Fleet Synchronizer
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your Weapons gain Cascading Power.
flavor_text: A single metronome for the whole fleet. Every gun learns to fire on the beat.

name: Master Override
effect_text: Attach to your ship. Your ship gains Crew Pooling.
flavor_text: The code the captain locks in the safe, for when the ship disagrees.

name: Debris Cloud
effect_text: Persistent Field. All attacks have -1 damage while this is in play.
flavor_text: Pieces of somebody else's morning, still drifting, still in the way.

name: Nebula Edge
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain Gain Stealth this turn.
flavor_text: A dust road between the real sky and the inhabited sky. The fleet slips through.

name: Ion Storm
effect_text: Persistent Field. All Weapons deal -1 damage while this is active.
flavor_text: The static grows teeth. Every gun gets less sure, then less sure again.

name: Gravity Well
effect_text: Persistent Field. All units' Evade is halved while this is in play.
flavor_text: Something heavy arrives at the middle and nobody leaves as easily as they entered.

name: Patrol Zone
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Quiet lines drawn across the region. Everything that crosses is noted by a small clerk.

name: Siege Banner
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons deal +1 damage while this is active.
flavor_text: A flag plants itself in the dark. Every gun under it finds more anger.

name: Defensive Formation
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Defense units gain +1 defense while this is active.
flavor_text: Every wall slightly closer to the next wall. Every gap slightly less of one.

name: Drone Swarm
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Drones gain +1/+1 while this is active.
flavor_text: The small bodies learn the same trick at the same moment and use it once.

name: Combat Theater
effect_text: Persistent Field. At start of each turn, deal 1 damage to every enemy unit.
flavor_text: The arena knows its business. Takes a small toll at the door for every guest.

name: Scanner Grid
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: Deep Scan.
flavor_text: A grid of small lights. Each one remembers a different shape the pilot might want.

name: Asteroid Belt
effect_text: Environmental. At start of each turn, Drones without Evade or Skyward Maneuver take 2 damage. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: Nothing bigger than a boulder, nothing smaller than a truck, and a lot of both.

name: Radiation Zone
effect_text: Environmental. All units lose 1 HP at the start of each turn. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: Every pilot in the zone gets a small certificate nobody is excited to receive.

name: Null Space
effect_text: Environmental. No Negate or Reactive cards may be played. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: A country where the surprise answer has been outlawed. The fast pilots like it there.

name: Solar Flare
effect_text: Environmental. All Modules cost +1 energy. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: Star stumbles once. The bill arrives, measured in every little piece of hardware.

name: Capture Zone
effect_text: Mission Complete: if you control 3 or more Drones for 2 consecutive turns, draw 3 cards.
flavor_text: A circle drawn in the vacuum. Everyone agrees on where the circle is. Almost everyone.

name: Basic Frame
effect_text: Passive: Your Weapons deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: The oldest frame in the yard. Still welded on more ships than any newer model.

name: Defender Hull
effect_text: Passive: Your ship starts each match with +5 Hull Integrity.
flavor_text: Built for the pilots who plan to come home. Others are built differently.

name: Scout Chassis
effect_text: Passive: End Cycle: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Light ribs, loud optics, a pilot that prefers knowing to arriving.

name: Cargo Frame
effect_text: Passive: Your ship has 1 extra Cargo slot.
flavor_text: A wider belly, wider windows, wider horizon for the things you bring along.

name: Fighter Core
effect_text: Passive: Your first Weapon each turn costs 1 less.
flavor_text: Cut down to the essentials. The essentials are fast, loud, and slightly rude.

name: Heavy Core
effect_text: Passive: Your ship starts each match with +3 Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Ten more tons of polite argument with whatever turns up with a gun.

name: Commander Core
effect_text: Passive: You draw 1 extra card at the start of the first turn.
flavor_text: The captain's frame. The captain's cabin. The captain's honest morning opinion.

name: Engineer Frame
effect_text: Passive: Your Modules cost 1 less energy.
flavor_text: Every bolt has a name the engineer has said aloud at least once, with tenderness.

name: Saboteur Core
effect_text: Passive: Your Disruption cards cost 1 less energy.
flavor_text: A ship that takes the enemy's plan apart with small hands and a smile.

name: Pilot Interface
effect_text: Passive: Once per match, your pilot ability triggers a second time this turn.
flavor_text: A seat that knows the pilot's shoulders better than the pilot knows them.

name: Plasma Volley
effect_text: Priority Fire. Overclock. Deal 6 damage.
flavor_text: Fires once, loud. Fires again, louder. The pilot never looks away.

name: Heavy Torpedo
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Cold Boot 1. Deal 9 damage; enters ready to attack.
flavor_text: Decides late in flight what it wanted to be. Turns out to be a funeral.

name: Barrage Cannon
effect_text: Priority Fire. Breach Cascade. Deal 7; adjacent units take 2.
flavor_text: Spreads the conversation. Nobody near the target gets to keep out of it.

name: Ghost Beam
effect_text: Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Deal 7 damage; any damage destroys Drone or Weapon systems.
flavor_text: Arrives from the wrong side of reality, leaves the correct side shorter than before.

name: Sniper Rifle
effect_text: Tracking Lock. Critical Strike. Deal 8 damage.
flavor_text: Long tube. Long patience. One pilot, one round, one quiet professional outcome.

name: Chain Lightning
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Chain Catalyst. Deal 9; adjacent take 3; next non-unit card +2 damage.
flavor_text: Jumps ship to ship, carrying the grievance without ever being introduced.

name: Gatling Cannon
effect_text: Alpha Strike. Deal 5 damage twice to target.
flavor_text: Bolted to the wing. Runs until the pilot stops asking. The pilot keeps asking.

name: Void Torpedo
effect_text: Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 14 damage; excess hits ship; apply 2 over 2 turns.
flavor_text: Carries a little of the void inside. Leaves the same quiet inside the target.

name: Interceptor Elite
effect_text: Interceptor. Emergency Reboot. First time destroyed, revive with 1 HP.
flavor_text: Goes down clean, comes back asking politely who is next in line.

name: Phantom Drone
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. Gain Stealth.
flavor_text: Never on the sensor, always on the hull. The enemy pilot adjusts to the absence.

name: Strike Wing
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Wing breaks the rail. Wing breaks the enemy. Wing breaks the mission log second.

name: Master Repair Drone
effect_text: Auto-Repair 3. Hull Drain.
flavor_text: Drinks what it takes to heal. Carries the rest home in the reactor for later.

name: Hunter Killer
effect_text: Critical Strike. Tracking Lock.
flavor_text: One quiet designation. One kind pilot. One very efficient shift change for the target.

name: Bomber Elite
effect_text: Hot Deploy. Critical Breach: deals 5 damage when destroyed.
flavor_text: Takes the run. Takes the hit. Takes someone else along for the paperwork.

name: Phase Shield
effect_text: Phase Drive. Ablative Plating 1.
flavor_text: Half the shield is here. The other half is arguing with the next dimension over.

name: Stealth Hull
effect_text: Gain Stealth. Cloaked Entry.
flavor_text: The hull the enemy sensor writes down wrong. The hull the pilot writes down fondly.

name: Reactive Armor
effect_text: System Shielding. Critical Breach: deal 3 damage when destroyed.
flavor_text: Eats the first shot. Spits it back. The enemy writes a long letter of complaint.

name: Fortress Barrier
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull.
flavor_text: A small fortress mounted on a less small ship. The pilot sleeps behind it, mostly.

name: Aegis Shield
effect_text: Ablative Plating 3. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Wears itself down slow, stitches itself up slower, always catches up by midnight.

name: Master Coordinator
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your Weapons gain Priority Fire and Overclock.
flavor_text: Speaks to every gun on the ship at once and is immediately understood.

name: Prime Tactics
effect_text: Persistent Field. Adaptive Learning. Chain Catalyst triggers on your first non-unit card each turn.
flavor_text: Learns the fight. Builds it. Ends it before the fight writes its own name.

name: Emergency Protocol
effect_text: Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 2.
flavor_text: Comes back quieter than it left. The pilot pretends not to notice the difference.

name: Railgun Slug
effect_text: Deal 13 damage to target Hull Integrity directly; ignores Shield Capacity.
flavor_text: Small round. Big math. Arrives before the sound does and leaves before either.

name: Nova Charge
effect_text: Breach Cascade. Deal 8 damage to target; 4 damage to adjacent units.
flavor_text: The briefcase opens. The afternoon rearranges itself around the opening.

name: Stabilized Field
effect_text: Persistent Field. Negates the first enemy card targeting this Field each turn.
flavor_text: Holds the boundary. Holds it politely. Writes no receipts for what it keeps out.
